# Host-side requirements for CARLA data generation and interactive tools.
# Used when running core/ scripts and tools/ directly on the host (Python 3.10+).
#
# Install with:
#   pip install -r env/requirements.host.txt
#
# Note: the 'carla' package requires CARLA 0.9.16 to be installed separately.
# See README.md for setup instructions.

# CARLA Python API (matches simulator version 0.9.16)
carla==0.9.16

# Numerical / data
numpy
h5py
pandas

# Image handling
Pillow
seaborn
matplotlib
fiftyone

# Interactive sensor tool (tools/debug/interactive_sensor_tool.py,
#                          tools/debug/annotation_debug_tool.py)
pygame
